response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an experienced full-stack and systems software developer with a strong web and application engineering background, but he has no discernible experience in SoC or IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD systems, or deep neural network training and inference optimization. The Principal Performance Architect role demands deep hardware-level expertise in AI accelerator design and performance analysis that is entirely absent from this resume. His performance work at Dunnhumby was in the context of low-latency web services, not silicon or hardware workloads, and his recent AI exposure is limited to software-layer agentic tooling. This is a fundamental domain mismatch.
strengths: Demonstrated low-latency and high-throughput engineering experience (async I/O, fibers, high-performance databases at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests/second)
Broad multi-language systems programming background including C, C++, and DLang indicating ability to work close to the metal
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling shows engagement with the AI space
concerns: Zero experience in SoC/IP modeling, hardware architecture, or hardware-software co-design — the core technical requirement of the role
No background in deep learning, neural network optimization, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator workload analysis
BS-only education with no advanced degree; while experience years technically qualify under the equivalency path, the domain expertise gap is not compensated

key_factors.factor: No deep learning or AI accelerator expertise
